name: ha-custom-cards
description: Home Assistant custom Lovelace cards — build & deploy orchestrator

scripts.build: npm run build --prefix solar-house-card && npm run build --prefix ecoone-visual-card && npm run build --prefix bravia-tv-display && npm run build --prefix bravia-tv-remote
scripts.deploy:clean: npm run build && DEPLOY_CLEAN=1 bash scripts/deploy.sh
